description:
State document, Fatimid. Mentions "al-khidma" and "al-muṭāʿ" or maybe "iqṭāʿ" (but less likely). Just a few words preserved in each line and difficult to glean the context. Needs examination.

Reused for Judaeo-Arabic prayers ("subḥān. . . .") in an Andalusī hand, with some similarities to that of Maimonides, but not in his hand (AA/MAF).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
